category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a C AMQP client library for RabbitMQ; official rabbitmq-c docs call it a C-language AMQP client library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rabbitmq-c; official GitHub repository is alanxz/rabbitmq-c.
docs_sources: Official generated rabbitmq-c documentation provides API docs and getting started material; official README is available in the repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/alanxz/rabbitmq-c, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a C AMQP client library; source_facts.executables lists AMQP command-line tools.
